name: profile: when g-ts-006 fires, its messageId payload references templates/tsconfig.strict.json as the canonical fix
command: mkdir -p proj && echo "{}" > proj/tsconfig.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/_dispatch.sh" --rule g-ts-006 --paths "proj/tsconfig.json" 2>out.txt && grep "templates/tsconfig.strict.json" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
